Ipv6GatewayBandwidthUpgradeAndDowngrade.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
Ipv6GatewayBandwidthUpgradeAndDowngrade.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
Ipv6GatewayBandwidthUpgradeAndDowngrade.bandwidthInMbps: The updated bandwidth of the IPv6 gateway, in Mbps
